title: SV: string len() operator in expressions not working

features.name: string method call on dynamically indexed queue element in foreach
features.description: Code should include a string queue with a method call (.len()) on a dynamically indexed element accessed via foreach loop variable
features.snippet:
string m_argv [$];
foreach (m_argv[i]) begin
  if(m_argv[i].len() >= 2) begin end
end
